shortTagline: Building real-world web applications using frontend, backend, and database concepts.
shortBio: I am a BBA-CA student with a strong interest in web development and software engineering. I build dynamic web applications using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Node.js, along with database integration using MySQL. I have experience creating structured projects like DBMS Workbench system and inventory management system with interactive UI and backend logic. I focus on writing clean, scalable code and continuously improving my problem-solving skills. Currently, I am expanding my knowledge in Java and backend development to build complete real-world applications.
